---
title: "Setup Instructions"
format: html
---

# Dependencies

- conda or mamba
- uv
- `git submodule --init --update` to clone the external dependencies (EFM3D is installed from local source)

# Setup Instructions

## Installation via separate uv envirnoment

```bash
cd oracle_rri
# create conda environment for cuda toolkit 12.1
conda create -f environment.yml
conda activate aria-nbv

uv sync --extra dev --extra notebook --extra pytorch3d
# or simply
uv sync --all-extras
```

This will install all dependencies and create a new python environment in `oracle_rri/.venv`.

## Optional: xFormers (Linux only)

EFM3D's DinoV2 attention utilities can optionally use [xFormers](https://github.com/facebookresearch/xformers) for memory-efficient attention / nested tensor support. Install it via:

```bash
cd oracle_rri
uv sync --extra xformers
```

## Optional: OpenPoints (Linux only)

```bash
# OpenPoints is built via the openpoints-shim dependency during uv sync.
# Ensure the submodule is present (PointNeXt lives in external/PointNeXt).
git submodule update --init --recursive external/PointNeXt

# Default: builds pointnet2_batch + chamfer ops needed by OpenPoints imports.
uv sync --all-extras

# Optional toggles (re-run uv sync to rebuild):
OPENPOINTS_BUILD_POINTOPS=1 uv sync --all-extras
OPENPOINTS_BUILD_SUBSAMPLING=1 uv sync --all-extras
# Chamfer is enabled by default; override only if you want to skip it:
OPENPOINTS_BUILD_CHAMFER_DIST=0 uv sync --all-extras
OPENPOINTS_BUILD_EMD=1 uv sync --all-extras
```

The build uses the CUDA toolkit found on `PATH` (aria-nbv provides CUDA 12.1). If `nvcc` is not found, set `CUDA_HOME` or `OPENPOINTS_TORCH_CUDA_ARCH_LIST` explicitly.

# Data Setup

- download the [Dinov2 ViTB14 checkpoint](https://huggingface.co/zgcr654321/pretrained_models/blob/cc2e7aace55d6f06716dcf444c29d97bac0a99da/dinov2_pretrain_official_pytorch_weights/dinov2_vitb14_reg4_pretrain.pth) and place it in `.logs/ckpts/`
- PointNeXt-S checkpoint:
  - [Google Drive Link](https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1UG8hh_CrUf-OhrYbcDd0zvDtoInrGP1u) - download, and move `s3dis-train-pointnext-s-ngpus1-seed1742-20220525-162639-Gz4ViiL95b6KP9MMH2ytG3_ckpt_best.pth` to `.logs/ckpts/`
  - [Model Zoo](https://guochengqian.github.io/PointNeXt/modelzoo/)
